overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring rain-soaked streets reflecting vibrant neon advertisements, holographic billboards, and towering skyscrapers. The footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showcases dense urban atmosphere with a Trauma Team vehicle encounter and detailed environmental storytelling.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city sidewalk with neon billboards

agents.ego_description: walking along rain-soaked sidewalk toward a stationary Trauma Team vehicle with emergency lights visible ahead

entered.detail: tall cylindrical structure wrapped with multiple layers of rotating digital advertisements
vertical pink neon sign spelling HOTEL on a distant building facade
large floating digital advertisements displaying product images and videos above the street
futuristic white aerial ambulance vehicle with red cross markings and blue underglow lights

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet reflective sidewalk in a dense cyberpunk district, approaching a stationary Trauma Team vehicle with emergency lights flashing. Neon billboards and holographic advertisements illuminate the rain-soaked street while pedestrians walk in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: emergency vehicle incident scene on sidewalk

events.description: passing close to the large Trauma Team vehicle temporarily blocking view of the street ahead

agents.ego_description: passing the Trauma Team vehicle and observing the emergency scene with gathered pedestrians

notable_agents.action: Trauma Team AV stationary with blue emergency lights flashing and rear hatch open

segments.scene_description: Moving past the Trauma Team aerial vehicle parked on the sidewalk, with pedestrians gathered nearby. The cylindrical billboard tower and hotel sign recede behind as the camera continues down the neon-lit street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street with food vendors and digital billboards

events.description: approaching a brightly lit food stall with neon trim on the right sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking past digital billboards and street vendors while navigating around pedestrians

entered.detail: small street vendor cart with warm yellow neon lighting and umbrella canopy
large wall-mounted screen displaying animated advertisements with cyan and white colors

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the wet pavement past large holographic advertisements, approaching a glowing food stall. The Trauma Team vehicle is left behind as the camera moves through the open plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with stairs leading to elevated walkways

events.description: approaching building with intense pink and magenta neon lighting becoming dominant

agents.ego_description: walking toward a building with prominent pink neon signage and exterior stairs

notable_agents.action: person in red reflective jacket walking ahead toward the stairs

entered.detail: multi-story building wrapped in vertical magenta neon tubes with rounded architectural features
small yellow and teal booth structure with glass windows and posters
wide stone staircase leading up to an elevated pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: Moving through an open plaza toward a distinctive building wrapped in vertical pink neon tubes. A yellow kiosk and concrete stairs become prominent as the camera advances, with fewer pedestrians visible in this section.

scene_state.functional_zone: towering skyscraper canyon with upward view

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of surrounding mega-skyscrapers
aerial vehicles with lights visible flying between towers above

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up at the towering skyscrapers and neon-lit building facades

entered.detail: immense vertical building facade covered in multiple large digital advertisement screens
tall cylindrical tower wrapped in spiral red neon rings and horizontal light bands
dark glass building surface with scattered illuminated windows and vertical signage

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to gaze at the immense scale of the cyberpunk cityscape, revealing towering skyscrapers covered in advertisements and a distinctive spiral-shaped tower with red neon rings. The perspective emphasizes the vertical density of the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk district that transitions from a crowded street encounter to a sweeping view of the vertical cityscape. It begins by walking along a reflective sidewalk toward a stationary Trauma Team vehicle with flashing emergency lights, surrounded by glowing neon billboards and pedestrians. As the camera moves past the aerial vehicle and the receding hotel signs, the scene opens into a wider plaza where the focus shifts toward large holographic advertisements and a glowing food stall. The path then leads toward a building wrapped in vertical pink neon tubes and a yellow kiosk before the camera finally tilts upward. This upward motion reveals the immense scale of the urban environment, shifting the perspective from the wet pavement to towering skyscrapers and a spiral tower crowned with red neon rings.
